review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.

Verify that the placeholder text in the specified markdown files (getting-started/installation.md, core-concepts/yaml-dag-engine.md, guides/team-collaboration.md, reference/schema-reference.md) has been replaced with comprehensive technical content.
Verify that the execution-contract.schema.json content is accurately embedded in the schema-reference.md files.
Verify that at least 3 concrete YAML examples (e.g. assist, feature-development, custom-deploy) exist across the documentation.
Verify that explicit Git/CLI commands for Team Collaboration (e.g. git fetch origin agent-sync, npx team-agents-cowork-init) are documented.
Verify NO implementation code (e.g., modifying src/ or bin/) or active state model semantic changes (modifying workflow/dispatch.json) occurred outside of this docs upgrade patch progression.
